name: Clinuvel Pharmaceuticals Limited
analysis: CUV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$9.7800. Trade idea: entry A$10.0700, stop A$8.2665, target A$11.9000 (1.01:1) — then trail it.
